index.title: MRA Limited — Manufacturer's Representative for New England
index.description: Leading independent manufacturer's representative serving New England wholesalers in plumbing, heating, and HVAC. 25+ top brands, expert training, local service.

blocks.title: Leading New England's plumbing, heating, and HVAC trades
blocks.subtitle: MRA Limited connects top-tier manufacturers with regional wholesalers and contractors. Expert representation. Local expertise. Responsive service.

blocks.section_subtitle: MRA handles everything a manufacturer needs to succeed in New England wholesaling.
blocks.feature_1_description: We represent 25+ leading manufacturers across plumbing, heating, HVAC, and engineered products. We know every product, every application, every territory.
blocks.feature_2_description: Our experienced team — Jon Mitchell, Tom Rayko, Zach Pona, Dana Lemire, Benjamin Whitaker — drives sales, opens accounts, and builds market share across New England.
blocks.feature_3_description: We train wholesalers and contractors on product features, applications, and best practices. Education builds trust and moves product.
blocks.feature_4_description: Each territory (RI, CT, MA, VT, NH, ME, NY) has dedicated sales coverage and support. Local presence, responsive service.
blocks.feature_5_description: We identify new market opportunities, launch new products, and help manufacturers expand in the New England region.
blocks.feature_6_description: When issues arise — pricing, availability, technical support — we solve them fast. We're the bridge between manufacturer and wholesaler.

blocks.testimonial_1_quote: MRA knows this market inside and out. They don't just sell products — they build relationships and solve problems. Responsive, professional, consistent.
blocks.testimonial_2_quote: The training MRA provides our team is exceptional. Their salespeople understand our business and our customers. That knowledge transfers directly to the field.
blocks.testimonial_3_quote: When we needed technical support or special solutions, MRA was there. They're not just taking orders — they're invested in making us successful.

blocks.eyebrow: Ready to work with a manufacturer's representative that delivers?
blocks.title: Let's build something together
blocks.subtitle: MRA brings top brands and real expertise to New England wholesaling. Contact us to discuss how we can support your business.

blocks.legal_text: 2026 MRA Limited. Manufacturer's Representative serving New England.

manufacturers.title: Manufacturers We Represent | MRA Limited
manufacturers.description: MRA represents 25+ leading manufacturers in plumbing, heating, HVAC, and engineered products. View the complete linecard.

blocks.title: 25+ leading manufacturers
blocks.subtitle: MRA represents the top brands in plumbing, heating, HVAC, and engineered products. Every manufacturer, full details, direct contact.

blocks.section_title: PVC, ABS, Brass, and Specialty Drains
blocks.feature_1_description: PVC/ABS drains, waste & overflow, shower drains, glues, cleaners, air admittance valves, test plugs. Market leader.
blocks.feature_2_description: PVC gasket and solvent weld sewer fittings (NAPCO). PVC/CPVC plumbing, industrial, irrigation, pool/spa fittings (LASCO).
blocks.feature_3_description: Cast iron soil pipe and fittings for DWV plumbing systems. Premium quality, long-life drainage solution.
blocks.feature_4_description: Plumbing and heating specialties. Complete product range for wholesalers.
blocks.feature_5_description: Leading manufacturer of PVF (plastic vinyl fluoride) products for specialty applications.
blocks.feature_6_description: Hangers for PVC, ABS, copper. Distributor of Bruco Products. Essential support infrastructure.

blocks.section_title: Furnace, Oil Tank, and Specialty Equipment
blocks.feature_1_description: Furnace and central vacuum systems. Featured products: Sootmaster furnace vacuums with HEPA-rated bags.
blocks.feature_2_description: Patented system for removing residential oil tanks through cellar hatchways. Popular featured product.
blocks.feature_3_description: Metal working products: brazing, soldering, welding, cutting, gas distribution for HVAC and plumbing trades.
blocks.feature_4_description: Screws, chucks, anchors, fasteners, and tools. Industrial-grade supplies for contractors.
blocks.feature_5_description: Expanding linecard continuously to serve evolving wholesaler needs.
blocks.feature_6_description: Expanding linecard continuously to serve evolving wholesaler needs.

blocks.feature_1_description: High-quality heating, cooling, and plumbing tubing solutions for wholesale markets. Engineered efficiency.
blocks.feature_2_description: High-performance pipe, tubing, and cable support systems. Essential for installation quality.
blocks.feature_3_description: Additional heating and cooling equipment partners. Full lineup available.

blocks.feature_1_description: Gasoila chemicals, thread sealants, PTFE tapes, cleaners, and specialty wipes. Professional-grade supplies.
blocks.feature_2_description: Complete linecard with full product specifications, pricing, and territory coverage available on request.
blocks.feature_3_description: Updated linecard PDF includes contact info, phone, fax, and product details.
blocks.feature_4_description: Continuously expanding to serve manufacturing needs.

blocks.title: Complete manufacturer representation
blocks.subtitle: From product representation to market development, MRA handles everything a manufacturer needs to succeed in New England.

territories.title: Territory Map & Sales Coverage | MRA Limited
territories.description: MRA serves 7 states across New England: Rhode Island, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Vermont, New Hampshire, Maine, and New York.

blocks.title: Serving New England and beyond
blocks.subtitle: MRA provides dedicated sales coverage across 7 states. Every territory has a dedicated manager and 24/7 support.

blocks.feature_5_description: Complete territory coverage. Dedicated support for NH wholesale market.
blocks.feature_6_description: Northern New England presence. Growing market, experienced coverage.

about.title: About MRA Limited | Manufacturer's Representative
about.description: MRA Limited — leading independent manufacturer's representative serving New England wholesalers since [YEAR]. Founded by Jon Mitchell and Tom Rayko. 25+ manufacturers, 7 states, one mission: success.

blocks.title: Creating and strengthening relationships
blocks.subtitle: MRA Limited is a leading independent manufacturer's representative serving New England wholesalers in plumbing, heating, and HVAC. Our mission: connect top brands with the region's best distributors and contractors.

blocks.feature_1_description: We are proactive ambassadors for every brand we represent. Your success is our success.
blocks.feature_2_description: We constantly search for new market opportunities and ways to grow your business in New England.
blocks.feature_3_description: We listen to what our customers want and solve problems creatively. No obstacles.
blocks.feature_4_description: We offer training to all levels of the wholesale supply chain. Education builds market share.
blocks.feature_5_description: Top-notch customer support. Responsive. Professional. Available when you need us.
blocks.feature_6_description: We ensure that our industry partners are profitable. Your margin matters. We make it work.

blocks.section_title: Five professionals committed to your success
blocks.feature_1_description: Partner. Founder. 20+ years industry experience. Drives strategy, market development, manufacturer relationships.
blocks.feature_2_description: Partner. Founder. Deep expertise in wholesaler relationships, territory management, business growth.
blocks.feature_3_description: Inside Sales. Order management, quoting, account support. First point of contact for wholesalers.
blocks.feature_4_description: Inside Sales. Customer support, technical questions, training coordination. Builds relationships.
blocks.feature_5_description: Outside Sales. Territory coverage, account development, contractor relationships. Field presence.
blocks.feature_6_description: We're expanding our team to serve growing market opportunities in 2026.

blocks.title: Ready to partner with MRA?
blocks.subtitle: Whether you're a manufacturer looking for representation or a wholesaler looking for better service, we're ready.

blocks.legal_text: 2026 MRA Limited. Manufacturer's Representative serving New England.
